description_long: This office building is a large, rectangular structure with a modern, symmetrical design, featuring a flat roof and multiple rows of evenly spaced windows along its facade. The main entrance is accentuated by a prominent portico and a circular driveway with a central fountain, creating a formal approach. Surrounding the building are landscaped grounds with numerous trees, paved walkways, and a spacious parking lot to one side. The building appears to have three stories, with the central section slightly projecting outward and glass-walled stairwells at the corners. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stone, with blue-tinted glass windows. The overall layout is organized and formal, with clear separation between the building, green spaces, and vehicular areas.
description: A large, modern office building with a flat roof, symmetrical facade, and multiple rows of blue-tinted windows, surrounded by landscaped grounds and a parking lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway with fountain, and symmetrical landscaping leading up to the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the parking lot, the building's depth, and the glass stairwell at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the building, the back landscaping, and the regular window pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the parking lot, side landscaping, and the building's rear entrance area.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, horizontal rows of rectangular windows evenly spaced across all facades, with consistent repetition and alignment.
